tomee.Resource: JdbcDriver org.postgresql.Driver JdbcUrl jdbc:postgresql://database:5432/postgres?currentSchema=tomee maxActive = 10 maxIdle = 5 minEvictableIdleTime = 10 timeBetweenEvictionRuns = 10000 validationQuery = SELECT 1 UserName tomee Password tomee

JdbcDriver org.postgresql.Driver JdbcUrl jdbc:postgresql://database:5432/postgres?escapeSyntaxCallMode=callIfNoReturn&currentSchema=dbpromo&stringtype=unspecified maxActive = 10 maxIdle = 5 minEvictableIdleTime = 10 timeBetweenEvictionRuns = 10000 validationQuery = SELECT 1 UserName dbpromo Password dbpromo
